company_knowledge.name: WeyBee
company_knowledge.description: Indian IT services and software engineering company focused on custom software development, IT staff augmentation, startup engineering support, data engineering, AI/ML solutions, digital transformation, and digital marketing.

possible_pre_incorporation_history.note: Some third-party directories mention 2013, but legal incorporation records point to 22 November 2019.

data_quality_risks: Founder/co-founder titles conflict across public sources.
Exact HR person needs internal confirmation.
Exact employee count is not publicly verified.
Some third-party sources show 2013, while legal incorporation is 2019.
Ahmedabad office address may have stale search results.
WeyBee pages contain repeated Social Sparsh labels and Codiqa footer references.
Some public pages contain visible typos and placeholder marketing text.
Groq and OpenRouter are not publicly verified technologies for WeyBee.

safe_public_answer.founder: Public sources conflict on founder/co-founder titles. Legal records show Vrunda Harshit Vakil and Dipti Hiren Kotadiya as directors.
safe_public_answer.employee_count: WeyBee publicly states 50+ employees; LinkedIn shows 51-200. Exact count is not publicly verified.
safe_public_answer.tech_stack: WeyBee works across .NET, Python, React/Next.js, SQL, cloud, data engineering, and AI/ML. It should not be described as only a MERN company.
safe_public_answer.contact: Use info@weybee.com for general contact and hr@weybee.com for hiring-related contact.

avoid_claims: Do not say Groq or OpenRouter are used publicly unless internally confirmed.
Do not hardcode one founder name as verified.
Do not claim exact employee count.
Do not treat Social Sparsh as definitely a division unless internally confirmed.

medium_confidence: Public tech stack from careers and services
